creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Alan: Well, simply updating is easier said than done, as the latest release upstream tagged is actually 1.2 (same version as the port).

So first we would have to decide which commit to target (or ask upstream to tag a release) and then do extensive testing, as the target platform seems to be an iXsystems product and not vanilla FreeBSD (at least in the past it could break in various ways on update).

So maybe patching the existing 1.2 port is the more realistic short-term solution.

Do you have the time/resources to test devel/iocage-devel and see if that works for you/is stable?
